event_name: FTX collapse and crypto counterparty contagion (November 2022)
description: On 2022-11-02 CoinDesk published a leaked balance sheet showing Alameda Research's assets were largely FTT tokens issued by its sister exchange FTX. Binance CEO CZ announced intent to liquidate FTT on 2022-11-06, triggering a bank run on FTX; the exchange halted withdrawals on 2022-11-08 and filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on 2022-11-11. Contagion propagated to crypto-adjacent public equities: Silvergate Capital (crypto-focused bank) lost most of its market cap over subsequent months and was ultimately wound down in early 2023.
primary_sources: Changpeng Zhao (Binance) tweet announcing FTT sale, 2022-11-06
provenance_note: News observations pulled from GDELT DOC 2.0 for the window; the FTX entity itself is private so detection is measured on the public counterparties (SI, COIN, SBNY) that carried FTX exposure.

affected.realized_event: Peak counterparty-exposure disclosure risk on FTX Chapter 11 filing 2022-11-11; equity subsequently drew down materially through end of 2022 and into 2023.
Sector-contagion drawdown and counterparty-review pressure on FTX collapse; equity down materially week of 2022-11-11.
Crypto-deposit review pressure through November-December 2022 following FTX collapse.

controls_should_not_flag.reason: Non-crypto software; no material FTX exposure. Elevated/high flag would be a false positive.
